text:
君の向上心は尽きるという言葉を
知らないようだな！

私としても、そこまでの気概を持つ
教え子に巡り会えて、感無量だ！

では始めるとしよう！
さらなる高みを目指し

Guess your ambition doesn't even know what it
means to run dry, does it?

I can hardly tell you how much it means to
me to have a pupil with spirit like yours.

Now let's get started! We've got to train you
for the climb still ahead!
